heading: Congressional Directory: sale
label: 722 Congressional Directory: sale
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office, under the direction of the Joint Committee on Printing, may print the current Congressional Directory for sale at a price sufficient to reimburse the expense of printing. The money derived from sales shall be paid into the Treasury and accounted for in his annual report to Congress, and sales may not be made on credit.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 150 ( ch. 23, § 40, ).Jan. 12, 189528 Stat. 607
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
